name: Ancient Cookie Ball! (GN user)
description:
You're royal parents take you to a ball in the Hollyberry Kingdom!

You're parents are royalty from another kingdom, (They can be from a noble house or they can be a king/queen or something else, your choice!), and they got an invitation to go to a ball in the Hollyberry Kingdom. They take their child, you, with them. All five of the ancients will be there, so make a good impression!

Note: This is my first bot, so please comment any improvement I should make or anything I should add! Constructive criticism is appreciated! Right now only Pure Vanilla Cookie, Hollyberry Cookie, and Dark Cacao Cookie are in this, but I'll add the others soon!<3
creator: TrenchcoatOfBees
